correct_global_claim: This campaign strengthens BHSM as a no-retuning geometric reinterpretation framework by packaging the corrected formal-kernel H_T scaffold, improving scheme-aware QCD/RG comparison, strengthening scalar/topographic decoupling scaffolds, and creating an integrated theorem/dependency ledger. It does not claim a completed first-principles proof unless every required theorem dependency is closed.

gates.title: v2.0 dependency graph and theorem ledger

open_proof_obligations: Prove the full twisted Dirac / H_T spectrum and infinite-basis complement bound.
Prove Index(D_twist)=3 and complete mirror-mode exclusion from the full operator.
Prove scalar/topographic decoupling from the full internal action beyond the v1.5 action scaffold.
Complete precision QCD/RG threshold matching for quark mass comparisons.
Derive full flavor matrices from the complete action rather than internal-rule screens.
safety_scan_result: no secrets, private correspondence, unrelated large binaries, or local/private data found

v1_5_scalar_action_decoupling_update.correct_claim: BHSM v1.5 builds an action-level scalar/topographic decoupling scaffold; it does not claim full scalar decoupling from the complete action.

title: BHSM Completion Campaign Report

v1_4_precision_qcd_rg_update.correct_claim: BHSM v1.4 improves the scheme-aware QCD/RG comparison framework; it does not change frozen BHSM predictions and does not claim precision quark matching is solved.
